tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose control or possible prediabetes. Creatinine is slightly above normal, suggesting reduced renal function or early kidney impairment. Other parameters, including glucose, electrolytes, urea, and calcium, are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and follow-up for glycemic control and renal function.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
